summary: All four requirements (REQ-75, REQ-76, REQ-77, REQ-78) appear to be implemented in the diff. The LoadDiagramDialog displays diagrams with metadata and handles selection with visual feedback. AttackPathToolbar includes a font size selector with predefined sizes. AttackPathCanvas uses a Textarea for multi-line text input (Enter creates new lines). The useAttackPathState hook manages fontSize state and passes it to new text labels.
